glosses.ja: 整理する; 企画する

translations.en: I'm organizing a dinner at my place.
translations.es: Estoy organizando una cena en mi casa.
translations.de: Ich organisiere ein Abendessen bei mir zu Hause.
translations.it: Sto organizzando una cena a casa mia.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在家里组织一次聚餐。
translations.ru: Я организую ужин у себя дома.
translations.pt: Estou organizando um jantar na minha casa.
translations.he: אני מארגן ארוחת ערב אצלי בבית.
translations.vi: Tôi đang tổ chức một bữa tối tại nhà.
translations.nl: Ik organiseer een diner bij mij thuis.
translations.uk: Я організовую вечерю у себе вдома.
translations.hi: मैं अपने घर पर एक डिनर आयोजित कर रहा हूँ.
translations.pl: Organizuję kolację u siebie w domu.
translations.el: Διοργανώνω ένα δείπνο στο σπίτι μου.
translations.nb: Jeg arrangerer en middag hjemme hos meg.
translations.id: Saya sedang mengadakan makan malam di rumah saya.
translations.sv: Jag ordnar en middag hemma hos mig.
translations.ro: Organizez o cină la mine acasă.
translations.da: Jeg arrangerer en middag hjemme hos mig.
translations.ja: 自宅でディナーを企画しています。

tokens.explanation: Elided subject pronoun (1st person singular) before a vowel-initial verb; subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; agrees with the subject 'J''.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of the noun 'dîner'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'organise'.
Preposition indicating location at someone's home/place.
Stressed/disjunctive pronoun (1st person singular); complement of 'chez' (i.e., 'at my place').

sentences.target: Tu organises la réunion à midi.

translations.fr: Tu organises la réunion à midi.
translations.en: You're organizing the meeting at noon.
translations.es: Tú organizas la reunión al mediodía.
translations.de: Du organisierst die Besprechung um zwölf Uhr.
translations.it: Tu organizzi la riunione a mezzogiorno.
translations.pt: Você organiza a reunião ao meio-dia.
translations.vi: Bạn tổ chức cuộc họp vào buổi trưa.
translations.nl: Jij organiseert de vergadering om twaalf uur.
translations.hi: तुम दोपहर में बैठक आयोजित कर रहे हो.
translations.el: Εσύ οργανώνεις τη συνάντηση το μεσημέρι.
translations.id: Kamu mengatur rapat pada tengah hari.
translations.ja: あなたは正午に会議を計画しています。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; agrees with 'Tu'.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'réunion'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'organises'.
Preposition introducing a time complement.
Common noun, masculine; complement of the preposition 'à' indicating time.

sentences.target: On doit organiser le barbecue demain.

translations.fr: On doit organiser le barbecue demain.
translations.en: We need to organize the barbecue tomorrow.
translations.es: Tenemos que organizar la barbacoa mañana.
translations.de: Wir müssen die Grillparty morgen organisieren.
translations.it: Dobbiamo organizzare il barbecue per domani.
translations.he: אנחנו צריכים לארגן את המנגל מחר.
translations.vi: Chúng ta cần tổ chức tiệc nướng vào ngày mai.
translations.nl: We moeten de barbecue morgen organiseren.
translations.hu: Holnap meg kell szerveznünk a grillezést.
translations.hi: हमें कल बारबेक्यू आयोजित करना है.
translations.el: Πρέπει να οργανώσουμε το μπάρμπεκιου αύριο.
translations.nb: Vi må organisere grillfesten i morgen.
translations.id: Kita perlu mengatur acara barbekyu besok.
translations.sv: Vi behöver ordna grillfesten i morgon.
translations.da: Vi skal organisere grillfesten i morgen.
translations.ja: 明日バーベキューを計画しなければなりません。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/impersonal subject pronoun (3rd person singular); often used colloquially for 'nous'.
Modal verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; selects an infinitive complement.
Infinitive verb; complement of the modal 'doit'.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'barbecue'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'organiser'.
Temporal adverb indicating future time.

sentences.target: Nous organisons une sortie ce week-end.

translations.fr: Nous organisons une sortie ce week-end.
translations.en: We’re organizing an outing this weekend.
translations.es: Estamos organizando una salida este fin de semana.
translations.de: Wir organisieren einen Ausflug für dieses Wochenende.
translations.it: Stiamo organizzando un'uscita questo fine settimana.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们正在筹划这个周末的出游。
translations.yue: 我哋今個週末安排一次出遊。
translations.ru: Мы организуем поездку в эти выходные.
translations.pt: Estamos organizando um passeio neste fim de semana.
translations.he: אנחנו מארגנים יציאה בסוף השבוע הזה.
translations.tr: Bu hafta sonu bir gezi düzenliyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang tổ chức một chuyến đi chơi vào cuối tuần này.
translations.ar: نحن ننظم نزهة في عطلة نهاية هذا الأسبوع.
translations.nl: We organiseren dit weekend een uitje.
translations.hi: हम इस सप्ताहांत एक सैर का आयोजन कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Διοργανώνουμε μια εκδρομή αυτό το Σαββατοκύριακο.
translations.nb: Vi organiserer en tur denne helgen.
translations.id: Kami sedang mengatur jalan-jalan akhir pekan ini.
translations.sv: Vi ordnar en utflykt i helgen.
translations.ro: Organizăm o ieșire în weekendul acesta.
translations.da: Vi arrangerer en udflugt i weekenden.
translations.ja: 今週末にお出かけを計画しています。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 1st person plural; subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; agrees with 'Nous'.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'sortie'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'organisons'.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'week-end' as a time expression.
Common noun, masculine; noun in a temporal NP functioning as an adverbial ('this weekend').
